title: Update contact information in ContactFooter

requirements.text: Update the contact information displayed in the ContactFooter component (frontend/src/components/ContactFooter.tsx) with placeholder-ready fields for address, phone number, and email address, clearly labeled and easy to locate for future edits. Replace any existing hardcoded contact details with updated, realistic-looking example values.
acceptanceCriteria: The ContactFooter component displays updated contact details including an address, phone number, and email address.
All contact fields are clearly labeled and visible in the contact info panel.
No outdated or placeholder contact values remain from the previous implementation.
The visual styling and layout of the ContactFooter remain consistent with the existing dark charcoal and amber theme.

constraints: Do not modify any files under frontend/src/hooks/ or frontend/src/main.tsx.
Preserve the existing visual theme (dark charcoal + warm amber palette).
nonGoals: Adding a backend contact form submission handler.
Changing the layout or structure of the ContactFooter beyond updating contact details.
Adding new sections or features to the site.
